zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Knyvet於1412年出生在英國貝德福爾提爾斯沃斯時，她的父親Sir John Knyvett17歲，母親Elizabeth de Clifton20歲。她於1428年與Richard Chamberlain在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1458年5月12日在英國英格蘭貝德福爾提爾斯沃斯享年46歲。

nameMeanings.name: Knyvet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knivett
meanings: English: from a Norman French pronunciation of Knight , resulting from the Norman French difficulty with the h of Old English cniht.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Knyvet was born in 1412, in Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England, her father, Sir John Knyvett, was 17 and her mother, Elizabeth de Clifton, was 20. She married Richard Chamberlain in 1428, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 12 May 1458, in Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46.

Elle a épousé Richard Chamberlain en 1428, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 12 mai 1458, à Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Knyvet(이)가 1412년 영국 베드퍼드실르 틸스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Knyvett(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Clifton(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1428년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Richard Chamberlain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1458년 5월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 틸스워스에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Knyvet родилась в 1412 г. в местности тилсворт, бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Knyvett было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Clifton, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Chamberlain в 1428 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 12 мая 1458 г. в местности тилсворт, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет.
